nodes.label: Release Workflow (release.yml — tag-triggered)
nodes.rationale: Triggered on v*.*.* tags. Three parallel build lanes (Python wheel on ubuntu, signed Windows exe, codesigned/notarized macOS app) each gated by the full check suite, then a fan-in github-release job. PyPI publish only on tag push, via trusted publishing (id-token: write).

nodes.label: Release Artifact Attestation and Code Signing
nodes.rationale: Supply-chain posture: actions/attest@v4 provenance on Python, Windows, and macOS artifacts; Windows Authenticode signing from a base64 cert secret (gracefully skipped when unconfigured, but --require-signed is enforced on tag pushes); macOS codesign/notarize via verify_macos.sh with Apple ID secrets.
